Our Services

Complete Facility Solutions.
One Contract. One Invoice.

Consolidate your facility services under one provider. From daily janitorial to emergency response — managed, documented, and verified.

Commercial Janitorial

Zero complaints. Every visit documented.

Daily, weekly, and monthly cleaning programs customized to your facility. Lobbies, restrooms, offices, and common areas — all verified through JaniTrack.

Disinfection & Sanitization

CDC-compliant. ATP-verified.

Electrostatic disinfection with hospital-grade sanitizers. ATP bioluminescence testing provides measurable proof of pathogen elimination.

Floor Care & Restoration

Floors that pass inspection. Every time.

Strip, seal, and refinish hard floors. Carpet extraction and encapsulation. Marble, stone, and VCT maintenance programs.

Day Porter Services

Your facility looks great at 3pm, not just 7am.

On-site daytime staff for continuous upkeep of high-traffic areas, restroom monitoring, supply replenishment, and lobby presentation.

Facility Maintenance

One vendor. One invoice. One call.

Light plumbing, electrical, HVAC filter changes, painting touch-ups, and general handyman services — all managed under one contract.

Post-Construction Cleanup

Move-in ready in 48 hours.

Three-stage professional cleanup: rough clean, light clean, and final touch. Debris removal, dust elimination, and final inspection.

Industries We Serve

Specialized Cleaning for
Every Facility Type

Each industry has unique requirements. We've built dedicated protocols for every vertical we serve.

Schools & Educational Facilities

K-12, charter schools, daycares, and universities. Green cleaning products safe for children. Allergy and asthma-friendly protocols. Summer deep-clean programs.

Get a Schools Cleaning Quote →

Proprietary Technology

JaniTrack:
Proof, Not Promises

Most cleaning companies ask you to trust that the work was done. JaniTrack gives you verifiable proof — with real-time photo documentation, timestamped task completion, and ATP bioluminescence readings that quantify surface cleanliness.

1
Real-Time Photo Verification
Every task documented with timestamped, GPS-tagged photos accessible through your dashboard.
2
ATP Bioluminescence Testing
Scientific measurement of surface cleanliness using the same technology hospitals use. Measurable. Reportable.
3
Digital Quality Reports
Weekly and monthly reports delivered automatically. Share with your board, tenants, or regulatory bodies.
4
Direct Communication
Message your cleaning team directly. Request re-cleans, schedule changes, or supply orders in real-time.

Compliance & Certifications

RFP-Ready. Procurement-Compliant.
Audit-Proof.

MBE / MWBE Certified
NYC & NYS registered. Eligible for diversity procurement programs and set-aside contracts.
SAM.gov Registered
Federal contractor registration with valid CAGE code and UEI. Ready for government RFPs.
$2M+ Insurance Coverage
Commercial general liability, workers' compensation, and bonding. COI available on request.
OSHA Compliant
All field staff trained on OSHA safety standards. Background-checked and drug-tested workforce.
NAICS Codes: 561720 (Janitorial Services) | 238210 (Electrical Contractors) | 561790 (Other Services to Buildings)
Request Capability Statement & W-9 \u2192
How It Works

From First Call to
Verifiably Clean

Getting started is simple. Here's what happens when you reach out.

01

Free Facility Walkthrough

We visit your site, assess square footage, traffic patterns, surfaces, and compliance requirements — at no cost.

02

Custom Cleaning Plan

You receive a detailed proposal with scope, frequency, products, and fixed pricing — no hidden fees, no hourly billing.

03

Dedicated Team Assignment

We assign a background-checked, trained team specifically to your facility. Same faces every visit — consistency you can count on.

04

JaniTrack Verification

Every cleaning session is documented with timestamped photos, task checklists, and ATP readings — accessible from your dashboard.

Get Started

Ready for a Cleaner,
Compliant Facility?

Schedule a free facility walkthrough. We'll assess your space, identify compliance gaps, and deliver a fixed-price proposal within 48 hours. No obligation.

Why GreenPoint

What Sets Us Apart From
Every Other Cleaning Company

JaniTrack Verification

The only local operator with real-time photo verification and ATP bioluminescence testing. See proof, not promises.

Zero local competitors offer this

MBE Certified

Registered Minority Business Enterprise with NYS & NYC. Qualifies for diversity procurement and MWBE set-aside contracts.

Only 2 of 17 competitors hold this

Fixed Pricing

Transparent, per-facility pricing with no hourly billing, no surprise fees, and no hidden charges. Know exactly what you'll pay.

Most competitors hide pricing entirely

Vertical Specialists

Dedicated protocols for schools, churches, medical, daycare, and government — not a one-size-fits-all approach.

No local competitor has dedicated vertical pages
Frequently Asked Questions

Everything You Need to Know

We provide commercial janitorial and facility maintenance services across five states: New York (Bronx, Manhattan, Brooklyn, Queens, Westchester), New Jersey, Connecticut, Pennsylvania, and Florida (Orlando and Miami metro areas).

JaniTrack is our proprietary real-time cleaning verification system. After every cleaning session, your team uploads timestamped, GPS-tagged photos and completes digital checklists. We also conduct ATP bioluminescence testing — the same technology hospitals use — to give you measurable proof that surfaces meet clinical-grade cleanliness standards. You access everything through a live dashboard.

Yes. GreenPoint Maintenance Services Corp is a Certified Minority Business Enterprise registered with New York State and the City of New York. We are also registered on SAM.gov for federal contracting. Our MBE certification qualifies us for diversity procurement programs and MWBE set-aside contracts at the city, state, and federal level.

We specialize in six core verticals: K-12 schools and educational facilities, churches and houses of worship, healthcare and medical offices, daycare and childcare centers, government and municipal buildings, and commercial office spaces. Each vertical has dedicated cleaning protocols designed for its specific compliance and safety requirements.

Yes. We use Green Seal certified, EPA-registered cleaning products across all facilities. Our products are non-toxic, allergy-safe, and free from harsh chemical fumes — which is especially important in schools, daycares, and healthcare environments where vulnerable populations are present.

We provide fixed-price proposals based on your facility's square footage, cleaning frequency, and scope of work. There are no hourly rates, no surprise charges, and no hidden fees. Every quote includes a complimentary facility walkthrough and is customized to your specific needs and budget.

Every GreenPoint team member undergoes a comprehensive background check before being assigned to any facility. We carry full commercial general liability insurance and are bonded. We also provide workers' compensation coverage for all employees.

Absolutely. In addition to scheduled cleaning programs, we offer 24/7 emergency cleaning services for situations like water damage, biohazard incidents, post-event cleanup, and post-construction debris removal. Contact us anytime and we'll dispatch a team.

Ready to Upgrade Your Facility?

Your Facility Deserves Better.
Let's Talk.
